name: Sofitel Legend Metropole Hanoi
reason: An icon of Indochinian elegance since 1901. Its historical wing and wartime bunker offer a direct connection to Hanoi's complex past.

name: Silk Path Grand Hue Hotel & Spa
reason: A contemporary tribute to imperial majesty, blending French architecture with traditional Vietnamese motifs.
location: Le Loi Street, near the Perfume River

name: Azerai La Residence, Hue
reason: The former residence of the French Résident Supérieur. An Art Deco masterpiece overlooking the Citadel.
location: South bank of the Perfume River

name: Four Seasons Resort The Nam Hai
reason: The pinnacle of luxury in Central Vietnam. All villas are designed based on traditional architecture and Feng Shui principles.
location: Ha My Beach, near Hoi An

name: Caravelle Saigon
reason: A centerpiece of Saigon's history since 1959. Famous for its role as a hub for international journalists during the Vietnam War.

name: Sofitel Saigon Plaza
reason: A refined blend of French lifestyle and Vietnamese hospitality, located on the historic Le Duan Boulevard.
